# Lighthouse Storage

Lighthouse Storage provides scalable decentralized data storage on IPFS with Filecoin and Walrus provider plans for developers, businesses, and individuals.

## Core Offerings
- **Recurring Storage Plans**: Monthly and annual plans for storing data with supported decentralized providers.
- **Decentralized Infrastructure**: Built on IPFS with Filecoin and Walrus provider options for data availability, immutability, and security.
- **Access Control**: Encrypt and store data securely with fine-grained access control features.
- **Developer Ecosystem**: Simple APIs, SDKs, and CLI tools to integrate Web3 storage directly into your applications.

## Resources
- Website: https://lighthouse.storage/
- Documentation: https://docs.lighthouse.storage/
- GitHub: https://github.com/lighthouse-web3
- Twitter: @LighthouseWeb3
